scripts.build:api:vercel: tsc -b packages/shared packages/db && npm run build:vercel --workspace @fitness/api
scripts.build:mobile:web: npm run build --workspace @fitness/shared && npm run build:web --workspace @fitness/mobile
scripts.vercel:staging:env:push: npm run vercel:staging:env:push:api && npm run vercel:staging:env:push:web
scripts.vercel:staging:env:check: npm run vercel:staging:env:check:api && npm run vercel:staging:env:check:web
scripts.vercel:staging:env:pull: npm run vercel:staging:env:pull:api && npm run vercel:staging:env:pull:web
scripts.eas:build:preview: cd apps/mobile && npx eas build --platform all --profile preview
scripts.eas:build:ios: cd apps/mobile && npx eas build --platform ios --profile production
scripts.eas:build:android: cd apps/mobile && npx eas build --platform android --profile production
scripts.eas:submit:ios: cd apps/mobile && npx eas submit --platform ios --profile production
scripts.eas:submit:android: cd apps/mobile && npx eas submit --platform android --profile production
